sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRAs 53 to 56 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.24. 2. For orders on CMA No.60/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 03.12.2025 Mr. Rafiullah, advocate holding brief for Mr. Altaf Hussain, advocate for the applicant. Matters are pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On the last date brief was held and adjournment was sought on behalf of applicant counsel. Same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
